ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "current_season" INTEGER /* Current season of the league */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the league administrator */,
  "admin_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the league administrator */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the club is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is based */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the club belongs to */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the club owner */,
  "chairman_name" TEXT /* Name of the club chairman */,
  "head_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach of the club */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager of the club */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league for which the season is held */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the club */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the club */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the club */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance per match */,
  "highest_attendance" INTEGER /* Highest attendance in a match */,
  "lowest_attendance" INTEGER /* Lowest attendance in a match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Home Win, Away Win, Draw) */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "additional_time_first_half" INTEGER /* Additional time added in the first half */,
  "additional_time_second_half" INTEGER /* Additional time added in the second half */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "current_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current club the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "kit_number" TEXT /* Kit number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists provided by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  "tackles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of tackles lost by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "current_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current club the coach belongs to */,
  "coaching_experience" TEXT /* Coaching experience of the coach */,
  "trophies_won" TEXT /* Trophies won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_current_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_performance" (
  "coach_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach performance record */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "matches_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the coach's team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the coach's team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_performance_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is leaving */,
  "to_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is joining */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid by the new club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's associated club (if applicable) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "possession_percentage_home" REAL /* Possession percentage of the home team */,
  "possession_percentage_away" REAL /* Possession percentage of the away team */,
  "shots_on_target_home" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "shots_on_target_away" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "shots_off_target_home" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the home team */,
  "shots_off_target_away" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the away team */,
  "corners_home" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "corners_away" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "free_kicks_home" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks taken by the home team */,
  "free_kicks_away" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks taken by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "season_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "passes_completed_home" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the home team */,
  "passes_attempted_home" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the home team */,
  "passes_completed_away" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the away team */,
  "passes_attempted_away" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the away team */,
  "tackle_success_rate_home" REAL /* Tackle success rate of the home team */,
  "tackle_success_rate_away" REAL /* Tackle success rate of the away team */,
  "dribbles_completed_home" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles completed by the home team */,
  "dribbles_attempted_home" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles attempted by the home team */,
  "dribbles_completed_away" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles completed by the away team */,
  "dribbles_attempted_away" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles attempted by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)
